item.description: For Exposing China’s Repression, Women Are Targeted With Deepfake AI Porn  NewsweekContent moderation alone cannot reverse sexism by design: AI-enabled abuse and the Grok case  ODI: Think changeSexual Deepfakes Used to Silence Women in Politics and Media: A Digital Age Crisis of Power, Control, and Truth  Modern GhanaShe Exposed Beijing's Secret Police. Now Its AI Porn Deepfakes Smear Her — as Ottawa Signs a Pact With the Same Chinese Ministry  The Bureau | Sam Cooper | Substack

item.title: I Run a Summer Camp. I Can Tell You Right Now That You’re Ruining Your Kid’s Summer. - Slate
item.description: I Run a Summer Camp. I Can Tell You Right Now That You’re Ruining Your Kid’s Summer.  Slate

item.title: Russia launches fresh strikes on Ukraine, Kyiv hits refinery hub - Euronews
item.description: Russia launches fresh strikes on Ukraine, Kyiv hits refinery hub  EuronewsRussians attack several oil and gas facilities in Ukraine simultaneously  Українська правдаRussian strikes target critical infrastructure in Zhytomyr region, fires break out  Ukrinform - Ukrainian National News AgencyRussian forces strike various infrastructure facilities in Ukraine: Russian Defense Ministry  1LurerRussia reports strikes on Ukrainian military targets, Ukraine claims strikes on Russian energy facilities  巴士的報

item.title: Stone Age humans built complex grass beds at Border Cave 200,000 years ago, study finds - Archaeolog...
item.description: Stone Age humans built complex grass beds at Border Cave 200,000 years ago, study finds  Archaeology News Online MagazineA 200,000-Year-Old Cave Discovery Is Changing What Scientists Know About Early Humans  VICE200,000-Year-Old Grass Bedding Found In Border Cave Reveals How Ancient Humans Made Their Beds  IFLScienceSouth African Cave Reveals 200,000-Year-Old Human Beds  GreekReporter.comStone Age humans were already sleeping on beds prepared with grass over ashes more than 200,000 years ago  La Brújula Verde
